steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank describes how Pheus 'truly shines' on stage. Right after, the narrator says he 'becomes another person, a more heightened version of himself' — signaling genuine, authentic self-expression. The blank must mean 'genuinely' or 'in reality.'

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'mildly': contradicts the passage's vivid description of heightened performance. ✗
  • Choice B — 'scarcely': means 'barely,' the opposite of what the passage conveys. ✗
  • Choice C — 'really': means 'genuinely' or 'in reality' — exactly matches the sense of authentic, heightened self-expression. ✓
  • Choice D — 'impolitely': irrelevant to the context of performance authenticity. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
